APPEARANCES: Atty. RONALD P. ST. CLAIR, ESQ. of Law Offices of Ronald P. St. Clair, Tel No. 415-788-1708 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF DECLAN CUMMINGS' Motion For Order To Correct Clerical Error In Judgment And Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc, this unopposed motion to correct spelling of a name in a judgment is GRANTED.
